description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist design. The structure is primarily white with subtle beige and gray accents, featuring multiple rectangular windows and several doorways distributed around the perimeter. The building sits on a green rectangular plot, with a detached small structure nearby, possibly a utility shed or mailbox. The layout includes a central entrance, open interior spaces, and a few partitioned rooms visible from above. The exterior walls are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing clean lines and geometric forms. The overall appearance is functional and contemporary, suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, multiple windows, and a clean, minimalist design on a green plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, several windows, and a detached small structure on the left.
description_view_1: Side view with a solid wall, minimal window openings, and the detached structure positioned at the rear left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more windows and a secondary entrance, with the green plot extending behind the building.
description_view_3: Angled side view highlighting additional windows and the detached structure at the back right corner.
